memo.title: Memory & Memo

memo.aiMemoryDesc: Content remembered by AI from conversations will appear here.
memo.deleteConfirmDesc: This memo will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

memory.title: AI Memory
memory.subtitle: Content automatically recorded by AI from analyzing conversations
memory.emptyInsights: No conversation insights yet. AI will fill this automatically after analyzing enough conversations.
memory.emptyPatterns: No behavior patterns analyzed yet. They will be auto-analyzed daily once enough data is accumulated.
memory.emptyWeekly: No weekly memories yet. They will be auto-compressed and summarized once 30+ days of logs are accumulated.
memory.deleteWeeklyDesc: This weekly summary will be deleted. The original logs have already been removed and cannot be recovered.
memory.insightsHint: The more you chat with AI, the more conversation insights accumulate automatically. AI analyzes and records emotional states, key decisions, spending intentions, and more.
memory.patternsHint: AI automatically discovers recurring behavior patterns by analyzing your conversations. Check day-of-week spending patterns, emotional trends, and more.
memory.noPatternData: No pattern data for this analysis.
memory.weeklyHint: Every week AI summarizes your conversations to create weekly memories. See key events, emotional flow, and financial context for the week at a glance.
memory.onboardingTitle: AI is starting to remember conversations
memory.onboardingDesc: The more you chat with AI, the more emotional patterns, key decisions, and life events are automatically analyzed and remembered. AI extracts insights from everyday conversations and builds a daily and weekly record.

budget.noBudgetDesc: Set a budget per category to manage expenses efficiently and track overages at a glance.

chat.skillExchangeEx2: How much is 100 dollars in Korean won?
chat.skillExchangeEx3: Tell me the yen exchange rate
chat.skillBudgetEx2: How much transportation budget is left this month?
chat.skillBudgetEx4: Have I exceeded the shopping budget?

chat.skillDocumentEx2: Find the contract among my documents
chat.skillNaverSearchEx4: Find Jeju Island travel reviews on blogs

toast.systemToggleFailed: Failed to change system job status.

cron.emptyHintAuto: AI will automatically send notifications at your scheduled time.

deleteDialog.title: Delete notification schedule?
deleteDialog.description: The notification will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

levelDesc.rule: Runs on a fixed schedule based on predefined rules.
levelDesc.pattern: Runs periodically by analyzing data patterns.
levelDesc.autonomous: AI autonomously decides and executes based on context.
levelDesc.runner: A runner job that processes tasks sequentially.
levelDesc.maintenance: A background job for system maintenance.

cron.systemRequired: This is a required system process and cannot be disabled.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect external services so Nion can work on your behalf.

google.description: Control Calendar, Gmail, Drive, Docs, and Tasks directly from Nion.

notion.description: View and create pages and databases in your Notion workspace.
notion.keyHint: Create in Notion Settings → Integrations → New API Integration.

github.description: View and manage repositories, issues, and PRs from Nion.
github.keyHint: Create in GitHub Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens.

tavily.description: Connect real-time web search to Nion for the latest news, fact-checking, and live data.
tavily.keyHint: Get your API key at app.tavily.com.

naver_search.description: Connect the Naver Search API to search blogs, news, Q&A, shopping, images and more.
naver_search.keyHint: Register an application at developers.naver.com to get your Client ID and Client Secret.

gemini.description: Powers image, video & audio processing as well as text summarization, translation, and report generation.
gemini.cap1: Image generation, editing & analysis / Video analysis
gemini.keyHint: Get your API key from Google AI Studio (aistudio.google.com/apikey).

pricing.hint: Leave blank to use system default rates. For local models (Ollama), you can set internal cost rates for usage analytics.

personas.subtitle: Create personas for different purposes and assign different providers and models to each. The default persona is automatically applied in chat.

dialog.noCustomEndpointModels: No models added to Custom Endpoint yet. Please configure a Custom Endpoint in Models settings first.

dialog.userNameHint: Name used to answer "What's my name?"
dialog.systemPromptPlaceholder: Write the role and instructions for this persona. Leave blank to use the default prompt.

dialog.systemPromptTooLong: A long system prompt consumes more tokens.

deleteDialog.description: Delete the {name} persona? This action cannot be undone.
deleteDialog.defaultWarning: Deleting the default persona will clear the default setting.

garden.budgetMsg30: Budget management is good. Stay focused 💪

Record spending/income and add goals

wellness.pageTitle: Time to care for your mind
wellness.noGoalsHint: Add goals to track them here
wellness.healingJoy_0: What a shining day! Hold on to that joy ✨
wellness.healingJoy_1: Happy energy is spreading through the whole garden 🌟
wellness.healingJoy_2: Why not share this joy with someone special? Happiness grows when shared 💛
wellness.healingJoy_3: You're having a brilliant day. It would be great to capture this feeling in your diary 📝
wellness.healingJoy_4: When you're joyful, the whole garden shines. Today is the best 🌸
wellness.healingPeace_0: Your heart is at peace. Fully enjoy this moment 🌿
wellness.healingPeace_1: You're having a warm day. You're doing great 💚
wellness.healingPeace_2: Small joys accumulate into great happiness. Well done today 🍃
wellness.healingPeace_3: A peaceful mind is the most precious asset. Keep this balance ⚖️
wellness.healingPeace_4: A good day makes a good tomorrow. Great work today 🌱
wellness.healingCalm_0: Even an ordinary day is a precious record. You're doing well 💜
wellness.healingCalm_1: Ordinary days stack up to create a special life. Let's keep going 🌙
wellness.healingCalm_2: Even if it feels like nothing, that's perfectly fine 🌫️
wellness.healingCalm_3: Just getting through today safely is enough 🫧
wellness.healingCalm_4: On an ordinary day, take a moment to look out the window. The world keeps flowing 🌤️
wellness.healingSad_0: Difficult emotions are okay. Nion is by your side 💙
wellness.healingSad_1: Feeling a bit tough? It's okay to rest. Nion is watching over you 🌊
wellness.healingSad_2: Feeling difficult emotions itself is an act of courage 🫂
wellness.healingSad_3: This feeling will pass soon. Hang in there a little longer 🕯️
wellness.healingSad_4: It's okay to rest today. Nion will be waiting beside you 🌷
wellness.healingDown_0: You seem very tired. Take it slow, step by step 🌙
wellness.healingDown_1: Be kind to yourself today. Nion is cheering for you ⭐
wellness.healingDown_2: Even on the hardest days, tomorrow will come. Just get through today 🌑
wellness.healingDown_3: You don't have to force yourself to be okay. Just rest. Nion is here 🌧️
wellness.healingDown_4: Feeling really tough? Close your eyes and breathe deeply. Nion is with you 💙
